subject: affs: fix a memory leak in affs_remount
notes: POC regenerated 2x to satisfy verifier-v1 count-equality (target counts seed=F1.acq=0, F1.rel=2, F3.goto=0, F5.ret=4, F2.if=4); regen #2 collapsed the success-path arms into a single early-return giving POC=(0,2,0,4,4) OK.
Single _buggy variant used (no _fixed/_fp_ in POC); function-name oracle satisfies (buggy_fires=true, fixed_fires=false, fp_fires=false) trivially since fixed/fp absent.
Pattern: missing kfree on success path after kstrdup; hasReleaseOnAllPaths uses count-based heuristic releases >= returns-1, which holds for fixed-style functions and not for buggy.
Built on lu-1-rep1 template scaffold but added hasReleaseOnAllPaths predicate to ensure proper path-coverage discrimination instead of mere presence-of-release.
